message:
feat(test): expand resize scheduler proptest coverage (30→45)

Add strategies and serde roundtrip tests for ResizeOverloadReason,
ResizeLifecycleStage, ResizeExecutionPhase, ResizeIntent,
ResizeSchedulerConfig, ScheduledResizeWork, ResizeSchedulerMetrics,
ScheduleFrameResult, ResizeControlPlaneGateState, ResizeStalledTransaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
